case_title: FORD MOTOR CREDIT COMPANY, A DELAWARE CORPORATION vs. BRYANT, JOHN G.

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF FORD MOTOR CREDIT COMPANY, A DELAWARE CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT BRYANT, JOHN G.
